title: Taubaté, SP — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Taubaté, SP: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Taubaté is a city in SP with a population of 320,820. A historic city in the Paraíba Valley, known for its colonial past, automotive industry, and as the birthplace of Monteiro Lobato.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
